segment.source: Renders a ranked ordered list where each row combines an optional rank number, an avatar (external URL, uploaded file, or initial fallback), name, optional subtitle, and a required score value, under a heading and rich-text intro. Use it for: rankings and standings, competition or tournament results, top contributors or sellers, high-score tables. Prefer 'Data Table' for multi-column tabular data; 'Stat Cards Data View' for unranked standalone metrics.
